title: Withdrawal Protocol for Study of Heavy Metals in Hair with EDX
author: Salvatore Del Prete

steps.title: Roll and string a pencil-thick strand...
steps.instruction: Roll and string a pencil-thick strand of hair or several thinner strands from the back of the head.

steps.title: Hair should be cut immediately above...
steps.instruction: Hair should be cut immediately above the skin, as close to the scalp as possible. It is necessary to note the length of the hair strand.

steps.title: The lock of hair must be...
steps.instruction: The lock of hair must be placed in the appropriate aluminium foil. The portion of the lock corresponding to the roots must protrude from the toothed part of the sheet. PLEASE NOTE. THE OPERATION MUST BE REPEATED for rate A and rate B.

steps.title: Each aluminium foil must be folded
steps.instruction: Each aluminium foil must be folded

steps.title: The aluminium foil must be inserted in the appropriate envelope-container
steps.instruction: The aluminium foil must be inserted in the appropriate envelope-container. The container-bag must be sealed

steps.title: The envelope must be accompanied by...
steps.instruction: The envelope must be accompanied by the collection report and the chain of custody form. Rates A and B must be brought to the laboratory or sent by tracked priority mail or by express courier.
